"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "### Impact
If the objects passed in as `names` to SimpleEval have modules or other disallowed / dangerous objects available as attrs.
Additionally, dangerous functions or modules could be accessed by passing them as callbacks to other safe functions to call.

Examples (found by @ByamB4):

Any module where non-underscore attribute chains reach os or sys:
- os.path, pathlib, shutil, glob (direct .os / .sys attributes)
- statistics (has .sys)
- numpy (has .ctypeslib.os and .f2py.sys)
- urllib.parse (has .warnings.sys)

### Patches
The latest version 1.0.5 has this issue fixed.

### Workarounds
Don't pass in objects or modules which have direct attributes to potentially dangerous items.
Use a wrapper to wrap the potentially vulnerable items (See the ModuleWrapper in version 1.0.5)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00524, "percentile": 0.40745}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-13T20:56:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32640"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-16T14:19:40Z", "published_at": "2026-03-13T20:56:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/danthedeckie/simpleeval/security/advisories/GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg", "https://github.com/danthedeckie/simpleeval/releases/tag/1.0.5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32640", "https://lists.debian.org/debian-lts-announce/2026/04/msg00023.html", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/simpleeval/PYSEC-2026-132.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/danthedeckie/simpleeval/security-advisories/GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/danthedeckie/simpleeval", "summary": "SimpleEval: Objects (including modules) can leak dangerous modules through to direct access inside the sandbox", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:47:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-44vg-5wv2-h2hg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "simpleeval"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.0.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SimpleEval: Objects (including modules) can leak dangerous modules through to direct access inside the sandbox
